birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is the smallest known bird. The bee hummingbird feeds on nectar of flowers and bugs found in Cuba

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits steppe to taiga and mountain valleys near freshwater, grazing on plants such as sedges (Cyperaceae), grasses (Poaceae) and water plants, and rarely swimming
